name: AI Knowledge Assistant with Google Drive Documents
description: Retrieves a document from Google Drive, processes it as a knowledge base with Claude AI, allows asking questions against the document content, and posts answers to Slack. Replicates the OpenAI Assistant pattern using Claude.

source.originalName: OpenAI Assistant workflow: upload file, create an Assistant, chat with it!

fileId.description: Google Drive file ID containing the knowledge base document

question.description: Question to ask about the document content

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the answer

assistantRole.default: You are a helpful knowledge assistant. Answer questions accurately based ONLY on the provided document. If the answer is not in the document, say so.
assistantRole.description: System prompt for the AI assistant

steps.name: Extract document content for knowledge base
Build Claude prompt with document context and question
Parse Claude output and strip fences
